name: web_read
description: Read a web page and return readable title, text, and links. Uses a fast HTTP fetch first and escalates to a headless browser for JavaScript/SPA pages.
implementation_notes: T0: httpx fetch + pure-Python readability via systemu.runtime.web.fetch_core. If the page looks like a JS/SPA shell, escalate to systemu.runtime.web.browser_pool.BrowserPool.render_html. Returns missing_packages=['playwright-chromium'] while chromium is still installing.
